/*
 * test_representative_100() for expf()
 *
 * Drop this function into test/test_expf.c inside the #ifndef EN_PERF block,
 * then call it from main().
 *
 * Covers: special IEEE 754 values, subnormals (result ~1), normal boundaries,
 * overflow threshold (~88.72), underflow threshold (~-103.97), ln2/ln10 exact
 * results, k*ln2 algorithm transitions, near-zero precision boundary, and
 * hard-rounding cases.
 *
 * Total: exactly 100 emit() calls.
 *
 * Key bit patterns used:
 *   0x42b17218 = 88.7228...: float overflow threshold (documented)
 *   0xc2cff1b4 = -103.972...: flush-to-zero threshold for float expf
 *   0xc2ce8ed0 = -103.279...: first subnormal result threshold
 *   0xc2aeac50 = -87.337...: last normal result (exp = FLT_MIN)
 *   0x3f317218 = ln(2) as float
 *   0x40135d8e = ln(10) as float
 */

static void test_representative_100(void)
{
    /* --- Section 1: Special IEEE 754 values (7) --- */
    emit(0.0f);                          /* exp(+0) = 1.0 exactly */
    emit(-0.0f);                         /* exp(-0) = 1.0 exactly */
    emit_u(0x7fc00000u);                 /* qNaN -> NaN */
    emit_u(0x7f800001u);                 /* sNaN -> NaN */
    emit_u(0xffc00000u);                 /* -qNaN -> NaN */
    emit_u(0x7f800000u);                 /* +Inf -> +Inf */
    emit_u(0xff800000u);                 /* -Inf -> +0 */

    /* --- Section 2: Subnormal inputs (result ~= 1.0) (6) --- */
    emit_u(0x00000001u);                 /* min positive subnormal: 2^-149 */
    emit_u(0x80000001u);                 /* min negative subnormal */
    emit_u(0x00400000u);                 /* mid subnormal: ~5.88e-39 */
    emit_u(0x80400000u);                 /* mid negative subnormal */
    emit_u(0x007fffffu);                 /* max subnormal: just below FLT_MIN */
    emit_u(0x807fffffu);                 /* max negative subnormal */

    /* --- Section 3: Normal boundary values (6) --- */
    emit_u(0x00800000u);                 /* FLT_MIN = 2^-126, exp result ~= 1.0 */
    emit_u(0x80800000u);                 /* -FLT_MIN */
    emit_u(0x00800001u);                 /* one ULP above FLT_MIN */
    emit_u(0x7f7fffffu);                 /* FLT_MAX -> +Inf (far above overflow) */
    emit_u(0xff7fffffu);                 /* -FLT_MAX -> +0 (far below underflow) */
    emit_u(0x7f7ffffeu);                 /* one ULP below FLT_MAX -> +Inf */

    /* --- Section 4: Near 1.0 (ULP density) (8) --- */
    emit_u(0x3f7fffffu);                 /* one ULP below 1.0 */
    emit(1.0f);                          /* exp(1) = e */
    emit_u(0x3f800001u);                 /* one ULP above 1.0 */
    emit_u(0x3f7ffff0u);                 /* a few ULPs below 1.0 */
    emit_u(0x3f800010u);                 /* a few ULPs above 1.0 */
    emit(-1.0f);                         /* exp(-1) = 1/e */
    emit_u(0xbf7fffffu);                 /* one ULP toward zero from -1.0 */
    emit_u(0xbf800001u);                 /* one ULP away from zero from -1.0 */

    /* --- Section 5: Exponent switching points (8) --- */
    emit(0.5f);                          /* 2^-1 */
    emit_u(0x3effffffu);                 /* one ULP below 0.5 */
    emit_u(0x3f000001u);                 /* one ULP above 0.5 */
    emit(2.0f);                          /* 2^1 */
    emit_u(0x3fffffffu);                 /* one ULP below 2.0 */
    emit_u(0x40000001u);                 /* one ULP above 2.0 */
    emit(4.0f);                          /* 2^2 */
    emit(0.25f);                         /* 2^-2 */

    /* --- Section 6: Mathematical constants with known results (12) --- */
    /* exp(ln2) = 2 */
    emit_u(0x3f317218u);                 /* ln(2) as float: 0.693147182... */
    emit_u(0xbf317218u);                 /* -ln(2): exp = 0.5 */
    emit_u(0x3f317217u);                 /* ln(2) - 1 ULP */
    emit_u(0x3f317219u);                 /* ln(2) + 1 ULP */
    /* exp(ln10) = 10 */
    emit_u(0x40135d8eu);                 /* ln(10) as float: 2.302585... */
    emit_u(0xc0135d8eu);                 /* -ln(10): exp = 0.1 */
    /* exp(ln2/2) = sqrt(2) */
    emit_u(0x3eb17218u);                 /* ln(2)/2 = 0.346573... */
    emit_u(0xbeb17218u);                 /* -ln(2)/2 */
    /* exp(2*ln2) = 4, exp(3*ln2) = 8 */
    emit_u(0x3fb17218u);                 /* 2*ln(2) = 1.386294... */
    emit_u(0x40051592u);                 /* 3*ln(2) = 2.079442... */
    emit_u(0xc0051592u);                 /* -3*ln(2) */
    /* exp(2*ln10) = 100 */
    emit_u(0x40935d8eu);                 /* 2*ln(10) = 4.605170... */

    /* --- Section 7: Overflow threshold stress (9) --- */
    /* Float expf overflow boundary: ~88.7228..., documented bit pattern 0x42b17218 */
    emit_u(0x42b17216u);                 /* overflow threshold - 2 ULP: ~88.72282 */
    emit_u(0x42b17217u);                 /* overflow threshold - 1 ULP: ~88.72283 */
    emit_u(0x42b17218u);                 /* documented float overflow threshold: ~88.72284 */
    emit_u(0x42b17219u);                 /* overflow threshold + 1 ULP */
    emit_u(0x42b1721au);                 /* overflow threshold + 2 ULP */
    emit(88.0f);                         /* safely below overflow */
    emit(87.0f);
    emit(86.0f);
    emit_u(0xc2aeac50u);                 /* -87.3365...: exp result = FLT_MIN (last normal) */

    /* --- Section 8: Underflow threshold stress (9) --- */
    /* -103.279...: first subnormal result; -103.972...: flush to zero */
    emit_u(0xc2ce8ecfu);                 /* just above first-subnormal threshold */
    emit_u(0xc2ce8ed0u);                 /* -103.2789...: exp gives smallest subnormal */
    emit_u(0xc2ce8ed1u);                 /* one ULP more negative: deeper into subnormal */
    emit_u(0xc2cff1b4u);                 /* flush-to-zero threshold: ~-103.9721 */
    emit_u(0xc2cff1b5u);                 /* one ULP past flush-to-zero: result = 0.0 */
    emit_u(0xc2d00000u);                 /* -104.0: well past underflow */
    emit(-100.0f);
    emit(-103.0f);
    emit(-104.0f);

    /* --- Section 9: Near-zero precision boundary (8) --- */
    /* Below 2^-24, expf(x) rounds to 1.0f in single precision. */
    emit_u(0x33800000u);                 /* 2^-24 = 5.960e-8: last x where exp(x) != 1.0f */
    emit_u(0xb3800000u);                 /* -2^-24 */
    emit_u(0x33000000u);                 /* 2^-25: exp rounds to 1.0f exactly */
    emit_u(0xb3000000u);                 /* -2^-25 */
    emit_u(0x3c000000u);                 /* 2^-7 = 0.0078125 */
    emit_u(0xbc000000u);                 /* -2^-7 */
    emit_u(0x3c800000u);                 /* 2^-6 = 0.015625 */
    emit_u(0xbc800000u);                 /* -2^-6 */

    /* --- Section 10: Algorithm transition at k*ln2 boundaries (14) --- */
    /* expf reduces x by n = round(x/ln2); these hit exact reduction boundaries. */
    emit_u(0xbfb17218u);                 /* k=-2: -2*ln2 = -1.386294... */
    emit_u(0xc0317218u);                 /* k=-4: -4*ln2 = -2.772589... */
    emit_u(0xc05dce9eu);                 /* k=-5: -5*ln2 = -3.465736... */
    emit_u(0x40317218u);                 /* k=4:  4*ln2 = 2.772589... */
    emit_u(0x405dce9eu);                 /* k=5:  5*ln2 = 3.465736... */
    emit_u(0x40ddce9eu);                 /* k=10: 10*ln2 = 6.931472... */
    emit_u(0xc0ddce9eu);                 /* k=-10: -10*ln2 */
    /* ULP neighbors of ln2: reduction residual crosses zero */
    emit_u(0xbf317217u);                 /* -ln2 + 1 ULP (toward zero) */
    emit_u(0xbf317219u);                 /* -ln2 - 1 ULP (away from zero) */
    /* Larger n: stress integer rounding in reduction */
    emit(10.0f);                         /* n=14, small reduced argument */
    emit(-10.0f);
    emit(20.0f);                         /* n=29 */
    emit(-20.0f);
    emit(50.0f);                         /* n=72 */

    /* --- Section 11: Hard-rounding / polynomial branch cases (13) --- */
    /* Values where the true result is very close to a float midpoint. */
    emit_u(0x3e99999au);                 /* 0.3f */
    emit_u(0xbe99999au);                 /* -0.3f */
    emit_u(0x3f4ccccdu);                 /* 0.8f */
    emit_u(0xbf4ccccdu);                 /* -0.8f */
    emit_u(0x3ecccccdu);                 /* 0.4f */
    emit_u(0xbecccccdu);                 /* -0.4f */
    emit_u(0x3e4ccccdu);                 /* 0.2f */
    emit_u(0xbe4ccccdu);                 /* -0.2f */
    emit(3.0f);
    emit(-3.0f);
    emit(5.0f);
    emit(-5.0f);
    emit(7.0f);
}

/*
 * Section counts:
 *  1. Special IEEE 754 values:           7
 *  2. Subnormal inputs:                  6
 *  3. Normal boundary values:            6
 *  4. Near 1.0:                          8
